recommendation: Ratify-strength reinforcement of the still-pending pre-judge mechanical self-check (legacy ledger seq 42; strategy.317dd8 seq1; strategy.ba6a39 seq1): two more independent missions add one sibling-prose-contradiction instance and one coverage-gap instance, both caught only at the cold gate. The sibling-prose-contradiction instance also broadens the family beyond the spec.md/.feature pair the prior evidence was drawn from — the contradicting sibling here was a plain design doc (design/loops.md), not spec.md itself — so the pre-judge check's sweep scope should extend to any sibling prose (design/*.md, README.md) asserting behavior a CR changed, not just the spec/.feature pair. Recommend the Council prioritize ratifying seq42's pre-judge extension now that recurrence spans 6 independent captures across 3 retro batches.
evidence: sdd-remove-formation-autorun spec-gate why (ledger seq2): architect FAIL on a sibling contradiction — design/loops.md:65 still asserted the auto-spawn the CR removed — reconciled in-CR; a sibling-doc-contradiction instance of the spec-feature-contradiction family, caught only at the cold gate

sdd-check-structure-breadth-vs-depth impl-gate why (ledger seq3): impl-judge observation led to adding a pipeline-level cluster-count test not in the original verification set — a coverage-gap instance, caught only at the cold gate

cross-ref: legacy ledger seq42 (original pre-judge proposal), strategy.317dd8 seq1 (2x coverage-gap + 2x spec-feature-contradiction, github-34), strategy.ba6a39 seq1 (3x coverage-gap, durability line) — this entry raises the cross-mission recurrence count, not a new pattern

recommendation: Ratify-strength reinforcement of strategy.317dd8 seq2 / strategy.7668d1 seq1 (both unratified): both prior entries drew their evidence from missions that wrote NO combat log at all (hand-run/reconcile-forward missions, or a 17-mission batch with zero *.log.jsonl files), leaving open the reading that the gap is purely structural (no log -> no correction line possible). These two new missions close that reading: sdd-remove-formation-autorun and sdd-check-structure-breadth-vs-depth are live in-session conductor runs that DID write a combat log (report + a re-open-ratification correction line each), yet the judge-iteration corrections that actually happened at their gates — an architect FAIL reconciled, a boolean-form reword, a coverage-gap closed — were folded into the gate's `why` prose instead of a discrete `correction` line with a matchable `cause`. The gap is a write-discipline habit in live conductor runs, not merely a no-log artifact. Recommend the conductor/spec-gate self-assert path emit a discrete correction line (correction-kind: judge-iteration, cause: <matching enum value>) into the combat log at gate-time whenever the gate `why` prose itself narrates a fix-then-pass shape, in addition to the why-summary it already writes to the ledger `gate` line.
evidence: sdd-remove-formation-autorun.log.jsonl: only 2 lines (report + the unrelated re-open-ratification correction); the architect-FAIL sibling-contradiction fix narrated in spec-gate why (ledger seq2) produced zero discrete correction line

sdd-check-structure-breadth-vs-depth.log.jsonl: only 2 lines (report + the unrelated re-open-ratification correction); both the boolean-form reword at the spec gate (ledger seq2 why) and the coverage-gap closed at the impl gate (ledger seq3 why) produced zero discrete correction lines

both missions prove a combat log existing is not sufficient — the conductor wrote to the log for the re-open ratification but chose gate-why prose, not a correction line, for the judge-iteration fixes in the same run

cross-ref: strategy.317dd8 seq2 (2-mission hand-run/no-log sample), strategy.7668d1 seq1 (17-mission batch, 0/17 combat logs) — this entry adds the missing live-conductor-with-a-log counter-case, strengthening the claim from structural absence to a write-discipline gap
